CustomField.description: Updates the Estimated Decision Date Based on Time Needed for POC
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Approval_Status__c,'Approved') && X2_4_Weeks_hid__c = TRUE, TODAY () + 30 , IF( ISPICKVAL(Approval_Status__c,'Approved') && X4_6_Weeks_hid__c = TRUE, TODAY() + 60 , IF ( ISPICKVAL(Approval_Status__c,'Approved') && X6_8_Weeks_hid__c = TRUE, TODAY() + 90, IF( ISPICKVAL(Approval_Status__c,'Approved') && X8_10_Weeks_hid__c = TRUE, TODAY() + 120, NULL))))
CustomField.label: (DEPRECATED) Estimated Decision Date
